title: Creating workback schedule from deadline
excerpt: I am trying to create a workback schedule working back from a deadline. I see that I can move timelines forward, but I’m not finding out to set it dependent on the final task.

posts.author: cincylindsey (Lindsey)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to create a workback schedule working back from a deadline. I see that I can move timelines forward, but I’m not finding out to set it dependent on the final task.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! Is the deadline set automatically or is it manual? For the date columns, you have the option to add a ‘negative’ icon to subtract dates (but you’ll need a date in those columns as well). So you’ll need to either have already added a date there manually or set an automation to add a date for each task.

I also recommend checking out the templates for dependencies, they have some great ones in there.
